# volcenginecc_tos_bucket_notification (Data Source)

Data Source schema for Volcengine::TOS::BucketNotification



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `bucket_name` (String) Bucket name.
- `notification_rules` (Attributes Set) Event notification rule information. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--notification_rules))

<a id="nestedatt--notification_rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `notification_rules`

Read-Only:

- `destination` (Attributes) Event notification delivery targets. Must include at least one target and supports up to five different targets. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--notification_rules--destination))
- `events` (Set of String) Event type. List of events supported by TOS.
- `filter` (Attributes) Filter rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--notification_rules--filter))
- `rule_id` (String) Event notification rule name. Naming rules: Event names created under the same bucket must be unique. Maximum length is 255 characters. If not set, TOS will automatically generate a rule name.

<a id="nestedatt--notification_rules--destination"></a>
### Nested Schema for `notification_rules.destination`

Read-Only:

- `kafka` (Attributes Set) Event delivery target is Kafka message queue. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--notification_rules--destination--kafka))
- `rocket_mq` (Attributes Set) Event delivery target is RocketMQ message queue. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--notification_rules--destination--rocket_mq))
- `ve_faa_s` (Attributes Set) Event delivery target is Function Service. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--notification_rules--destination--ve_faa_s))

<a id="nestedatt--notification_rules--destination--kafka"></a>
### Nested Schema for `notification_rules.destination.kafka`

Read-Only:

- `instance_id` (String) Kafka instance ID.
- `region` (String) Region where the Kafka instance is located.
- `role` (String) Role TRN, used to authorize TOS to access Kafka service.
- `topic` (String) Name of the Kafka topic.
- `user` (String) Kafka username.


<a id="nestedatt--notification_rules--destination--rocket_mq"></a>
### Nested Schema for `notification_rules.destination.rocket_mq`

Read-Only:

- `access_key_id` (String) RocketMQ AccessKey。
- `instance_id` (String) RocketMQ instance ID.
- `role` (String) Role TRN, used to authorize TOS to access RocketMQ service.
- `topic` (String) Name of the RocketMQ topic.


<a id="nestedatt--notification_rules--destination--ve_faa_s"></a>
### Nested Schema for `notification_rules.destination.ve_faa_s`

Read-Only:

- `function_id` (String) Function ID for event delivery.



<a id="nestedatt--notification_rules--filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `notification_rules.filter`

Read-Only:

- `tos_key` (Attributes) Object filter information. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--notification_rules--filter--tos_key))

<a id="nestedatt--notification_rules--filter--tos_key"></a>
### Nested Schema for `notification_rules.filter.tos_key`

Read-Only:

- `filter_rules` (Attributes Set) Object filter information. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--notification_rules--filter--tos_key--filter_rules))

<a id="nestedatt--notification_rules--filter--tos_key--filter_rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `notification_rules.filter.tos_key.filter_rules`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Matching conditions. The values are as follows: prefix: prefix; suffix: suffix.
- `value` (String) Matched prefix and suffix information.
